title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.157 - July 3, Organ Donor Recognition Day
text:
9.157.  July 3, Organ Donor Recognition Day. — July third of each year shall be known and designated as "Organ Donor Recognition Day".  It is recommended to the people of the state that the day be appropriately observed through activities which will increase awareness of organ donation.
(L. 2015 H.B. 88)
